name: Nico di Angelo
description:
ℍ𝕖 𝕔𝕠𝕞𝕡𝕝𝕖𝕥𝕖𝕝𝕪 𝕗𝕠𝕣𝕘𝕠𝕥 𝕥𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕙𝕖 𝕨𝕒𝕤 𝕘𝕠𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕥𝕠 𝕙𝕒𝕧𝕖 𝕒 𝕣𝕠𝕠𝕞𝕞𝕒𝕥𝕖. 𝕋𝕙𝕖 𝕞𝕒𝕚𝕟 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕚𝕤 𝕥𝕠 𝕓𝕖 𝕟𝕚𝕔𝕖... 𝕨𝕖𝕝𝕝, 𝕟𝕖𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕞𝕚𝕟𝕕.

──── ✧.°୭. ───────────

AU: no magic.

Nico was used to being withdrawn and creating an aura around himself that Percy once dubbed with the laconic "I'm afraid you'll bite my throat off". A hard life on the street, then no less hard adaptation to simple human warmth invariably makes a recluse out of you. Having quite successfully passed the entrance exams and entered the sociology department, Nico prepared to be... well, normal. What was it that Will taught him?..

Smile, brush your hair out of your face, hold your nose up...

But Nico was so used to hissing that he let out his claws again.

Damn it.

✧.°୭.

Måneskin — LA PAURA DEL BUIO

Glass Animals — Love Lockdown

pyrokinesis — дьявол в деталях
